home.heroSubtitle: A complete beginner's guide to building modern websites with React, from zero coding experience to deploying your first app
home.featuresHeading: Everything You Need to Build Modern Websites
home.featureLearnDescription: Clear, jargon-free tutorials that take you from installing your first tool to building complete websites
home.featureCodeDescription: Fill in simple forms and get working React code instantly - no typing required
home.featureAIDescription: Learn how to use ChatGPT and Claude to write code, debug errors, and build features fast
home.featureExamDescription: Take the exam to check what you've learned, review wrong answers, and retake to improve your score
home.featureExamplesDescription: See how to build portfolios, blogs, dashboards, e-commerce sites, and more with full source code
home.featureGlossaryDescription: Every technical term explained in plain English with examples - never feel lost again
home.ctaSubtitle: Start with the Getting Started guide and have your first React app running in 15 minutes

exam.title: Web Development Exam
exam.description: Test your knowledge of React web development. You need 70% to pass. You can retake the exam as many times as you like to improve your score.
exam.passMessage: You scored {score}% - well done! You have a solid understanding of React web development.
exam.failMessage: You scored {score}% - you need 70% to pass. Review the topics below and try again. You can retake the exam anytime!
exam.noHistory: No exam attempts yet. Take your first exam!

generator.title: React Code Generator
generator.description: Fill in the form below and get working React code instantly. Perfect for beginners who want to see what different types of code look like.
generator.type: What do you want to generate?

bookmarks.title: Your Bookmarks
bookmarks.description: Pages you've saved for quick access. Bookmark any page using the bookmark button in the top-right corner.
bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Browse the guide and bookmark pages you want to come back to!

progress.title: Your Learning Progress
progress.description: Track how far you've come in your React web development journey.
progress.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will clear all your progress, bookmarks, and exam history.
progress.noProgress: You haven't started learning yet. Head to Getting Started to begin!

glossary.title: Web Development Glossary
glossary.description: Every technical term explained in plain English. Use the search to find what you need, or browse by category.
glossary.noResults: No terms found matching your search.
